item.title: Make dinner for my cats with me, featuring a rough breakdown of total kcals per meal! They normally get between 50-70 calories per meal, and always split treats (e.g one mussell and lamb heart between all three kitties) 🤍 #cat #cattok #catsoftiktok #cat
